title: ZXPong Complete Guide
description: Everything you need to know about ZXPong, from learning the controls to mastering Solo play, World PVP, achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins.
summary: Discover how to play ZXPong, improve your skills, and make the most of every match.

sections.heading: Welcome to ZXPong
paragraphs: ZXPong is a fast-paced arcade paddle game where quick reactions, accurate positioning, and long rallies are the keys to victory.
Whether you're learning the basics in Solo Play or competing against players around the world in World PVP, every match helps you improve your skills and climb the leaderboards.

sections.heading: Everything You Need to Learn
paragraphs: Start with the How to Play guide to understand the basics, then continue through the Controls and Game Modes pages to develop your skills.
Once you're comfortable with the gameplay, explore BarkinMad Coins, Achievements, Leaderboards, and Tips & Strategy to discover even more ways to improve.
bullets: How to Play – Learn the basics of every match.
Controls – Improve your paddle movement and reactions.
Game Modes – Explore Solo Play and World PVP.
Progression – Unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and climb the leaderboards.

sections.heading: Growing with Every Update
paragraphs: ZXPong continues to evolve with new features, improvements, and additional content planned for future updates.
As new artwork and gameplay features become available, this guide will continue to grow alongside the game.

sections.heading: Keep Improving
paragraphs: Every match is another opportunity to improve your reactions, extend your rallies, unlock achievements, and earn BarkinMad Coins.
Whether you're chasing your personal best or competing online, every game helps you become a stronger player.

images.caption: Fast-paced arcade gameplay with every rally.
Additional screenshots will be added as the game continues to grow.

featureShowcases.heading: Everything You Need to Master ZXPong
featureShowcases.summary: From your first rally to online competition, this guide covers every part of ZXPong.
body: Whether you're just starting out or aiming to become one of the best players, this guide brings together everything you need in one place.
Learn the controls, improve your reactions, unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and compete for the longest rally.
bullets: Master Solo Play and World PVP.

image.caption: Everything you need to become a ZXPong champion.

featureShowcases.heading: Every Match Helps You Improve
featureShowcases.summary: Achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins reward every game you play.
body: As your skills improve, you'll unlock achievements, compete for longer rallies, and earn BarkinMad Coins to unlock cosmetic rewards.
Whether you're playing Solo or World PVP, every match helps you progress.

image.caption: Every rally brings you closer to your next achievement.
